search.query: `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id
rangemap field=riskLevel medium=4-7 low=1-3 high=8-10 | stats count by range

drilldown.link: search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | rangemap field=riskLevel medium=4-7 low=1-3 high=8-10 | search range=$click.value$&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

condition.link: search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search NOT[search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | top category limit=10 useother=true showcount=false showperc=false | format]&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now
search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search category="$click.value$"&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search NOT[search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | top type limit=10 useother=true showcount=false showperc=false | format]&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now
search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search type="$click.value$"&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | eval operatingSystem=if(operatingSystem="null","Unknown",operatingSystem) | search NOT[search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | eval operatingSystem=if(operatingSystem="null","Unknown",operatingSystem) | top operatingSystem limit=10 useother=true showcount=false showperc=false | format]&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | eval operatingSystem=if(operatingSystem="null","Unknown",operatingSystem) | search operatingSystem="$click.value$"&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search NOT[search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | top site.location limit=10 useother=true showcount=false showperc=false | format]&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now
search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" site.location="$site$" | dedup id | stats values(*) as * by _time id | search "site.location"="$click.value$"&earliest=-24h@h&latest=now

search.query: sort - lastSeen | head 10 | rangemap field=riskLevel medium=4-7 low=1-3 high=8-1 | table id range, name, category, type, model, manufacturer, macAddress, ipAddress, firstSeen, lastSeen, site.location, site.name, tags{} | rename id as ID, range as Risk, name as "Device Name", category as Category, type as Type, model as Model, manufacturer as Brand, macAddress as MAC, ipAddress as "IP Address", firstSeen as "First Seen", lastSeen as "Last Seen", site.location as "Site Location", site.name as "Site Name", tags{} as Tags | eval "IP Address"=if('IP Address'="null","-",'IP Address') | eval epoch = strptime('First Seen',"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f") | eval "First Seen" = strftime(epoch, "%b %d,%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | eval epoch = strptime('Last Seen',"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f") | eval "Last Seen" = strftime(epoch, "%b %d,%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | fields - epoch
